diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
# Tailwind LSP is for IDE autocomplete; no CLI diagnostics
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: Tailwind LSP is IDE-only (class autocomplete, color preview). No meaningful CLI hook — validation happens via the tailwindcss CLI build.
